apps.name: YouTube Modwanz
apps.changelog:
- Sponsor-block
- Ad-free playback
- Mini-player support
- Local queue support
- Gemini Model Updates
- Live stream chat support, etc
- Built-in video and playlist downloader
- Background & Picture-in-Picture support
